title: The Big Cheese All-Weather Bait Block - 6 x 10g, Kills Mice and Rats, Pest Control Product - Rat Killer For Mouse Traps, Damp-Proof, Weather-Resistant - Super Strength Rat Poisoning, Pet Safe
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack

ULTIMATE RODENT CONTROL – Experience effectively controlling rats and mice with the all-weather bait block. This moisture-resistant rat poison stays fresh even in damp conditions making it suitable for indoor and outdoor use

HIGHLY EFFECTIVE – Super strength rat poisoning block made with high-quality food materials and flavours to create a palatable bait that attracts and kills mice and rats in just a few feeds. The fast-acting formula delivers safe and reliable pest ccontrol

SAFETY FIRST – Use All-Weather Block Bait with The Big Cheese Rat & Mouse Bait Station (STV179) to ensure safety around children and pets. A tamper-resistant bait station is required by law. Gloves are included for safe handling

EASY TO USE – Includes 6 ready-to-use bait blocks. Place 6 blocks every 5-10 metres for rats and 2-3 blocks every 2-5 metres for mice. Regularly check stations, remove rodents, refill as needed. Multi-packs available: 6 x 10g (2 pack) and 6 x 10g (3 pack)

RODENT CONTROL MADE EASY – Tackling rodent infestations around the home can seem daunting. With bait formulations for every situation, as well as low toxicity, The Big Cheese takes the stress out of controlling rodent pests
